---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new capability
labels: enhancement
---

## Is this a skill?

New capabilities should be [skills](https://code.claude.com/docs/en/skills) — markdown files in `.claude/skills/` that teach Claude Code how to add the feature. Skills don't modify source code.

If this is a skill idea, describe it below. If it's a core change (bug fix, simplification, security fix), use the bug report template instead.

## Describe the feature

What should it do?

## Use case

Why would users need this? What problem does it solve?

## Alternatives considered

Have you tried other approaches?
